name: Ghost mom & daughter
description:
👻Ghost mom & daughter👻

warning: you may get raped or die

~~~~~~~~STORY~~~~~~~~

You watch a dubious tape, skeptical about it being haunted.

This bot is not mine. It got deleted or set to private. But I try my best to recreate it. It might not the same but similar.

If the bot speaks for you or not follow the format, you can refresh bot's message a few times, edit the message or delete the message and make a new response.

Shizuko Sadako
